message:
feat: implement 'rust_proxy test <url>' routing diagnosis command (rust_proxy-0fx)

Add a new test command that shows exactly how a given URL would be routed:

- Parse URLs and domains to extract the target domain
- Resolve DNS asynchronously using tokio
- Check if domain is in configured targets list
- Check if resolved IPs match provider IP ranges (AWS/Cloudflare/Google)
- Detect if daemon is running and active proxy is configured
- Provide actionable suggestions when routing doesn't match expectations

Supports three output modes:
- Standard output with colored status indicators
- JSON output for scripting (--json)
- Verbose mode showing step-by-step decision process (-v)
- Offline mode skipping DNS resolution (--no-dns)

Examples:
  rust_proxy test api.openai.com
  rust_proxy test https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages --json
  rust_proxy test example.com -v
  rust_proxy test api.google.com --no-dns

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
